appDescription.message: Open Jira URLs by simply typing the issue number

configSubtitleNoUrl.message: It looks like you haven't configured a URL to open

configSubtitleHasUrl.message: This is the URL you have configured to open

configHint.message: Remember! Ctrl+Shift+Z opens this extension directly

enterNumberLabel.message: Enter the number and press Enter

openIssueHint.message: The issue will open directly in a new tab
